finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_11.md:167; chapters/chapter_11.md:179; chapters/chapter_11.md:185; chapters/chapter_11.md:193; chapters/chapter_11.md:315; chapters/chapter_11.md:567
finding_results.notes: Ben's outcome thread now carries an immediate secondary exploitation beat: Gemini converts the sabotaged event into a replay pickup before the chapter rejoins the household line. Nita still retains the supplement/freeze-week outcome, but the adult strands no longer resolve in the same neat sabotage-to-dashboard-to-text cadence.
finding_results.summary: The chapter's mirrored work-thread architecture was roughened by giving Ben a distinct post-event aftershock before the shared stipend convergence.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_11.md:543; chapters/chapter_11.md:545; chapters/chapter_11.md:549; chapters/chapter_11.md:553; chapters/chapter_11.md:567; chapters/chapter_11.md:596
finding_results.notes: The kitchen debrief now works through the tote, badge state, Janice's arrival, the pudding, and the pretzels instead of thesis nouns about system behavior. That leaves the stipend banner and grocery crates to finish the punch through object logic and money pressure.
finding_results.summary: Abstract explanation was replaced with concrete conflict so the system's appetite for visible strain is inferred from branded rescue artifacts and the stipend payoff.

summary: Revised chapter_11 to break the schematic parallel between Ben and Nita's sabotage outcomes and to replace the kitchen's explanatory thesis language with object-driven escalation that pays off in the stipend and grocery-crate ending.
